notes: Ethereum execution kernel. Mantle sees it through ethereum-optimism/op-geth and Mantle op-geth; hardfork, EVM, block header, blob, RPC, and txpool changes can propagate into mantle-xyz/op-geth and mantle-xyz/mantle-v2.

OP Stack monorepo and the highest-impact Mantle upstream. Feeds mantle-v2 as a Go monorepo fork, mantle-reth through rust/op-reth vendored at op-reth/v2.2.1, mantle-kona through the post-archive rust/kona baseline, and mantle-v2/rust through the kona-client/v1.5.1 subtree path.

OP Stack Go execution client, itself downstream of ethereum/go-ethereum. mantle-xyz/op-geth tracks this repo's optimism branch; upstream hardfork, EVM, Engine API, miner, txpool, and RPC changes must be merged into Mantle's Go execution layer.

Rust Ethereum execution framework. Mantle has two separate reth version lines: mantle-reth passively inherits rev 88505c7f (= v2.2.0) from op-reth/v2.2.1, while mantle-kona inherits v1.6.0 only for reth-db/reth-codecs supervisor storage.
EVM core upstream for mantle-xyz/revm. Mantle carries two revm lines: mantle-elysium (revm 38/op-revm 19) for reth and mantle-v2, and v2.2.2 (revm 31/op-revm 12) for kona and op-succinct.
SP1-based OP Stack validity proving harness. mantle-xyz/op-succinct is a Mantle fork that re-points kona/revm/op-alloy/evm dependencies to Mantle forks.
